executive_summary: The user leans toward prestige cinema, historical/war dramas, espionage thrillers, and select horror. Off-server picks focus on underrepresented classics and craft-driven titles that echo those tastes while avoiding items already present in Plex's library_candidates.

on_server_recommendations.title: Pulp Fiction
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Iconic nonlinear crime drama with sharp dialogue and ensemble cast; aligns with user's appetite for stylish genre cinema and prestige storytelling.

on_server_recommendations.title: Django Unchained
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Stylish genre filmmaking with historical and action elements; fits the user’s taste for high-energy, character-driven cinema from acclaimed auteurs.

on_server_recommendations.title: Back to the Future
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Iconic sci‑fi adventure with broad appeal and time-travel themes; complements the user’s interest in blockbuster, franchise-oriented cinema.

on_server_recommendations.title: A Fistful of Dollars
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Spaghetti Western staple with lean storytelling and brisk action; aligns with the user’s interest in genre history and action epics.

on_server_recommendations.title: Ben-Hur
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Historical epic with grand scale; matches the user’s taste for historical/war drama and cinematic milestones.

on_server_recommendations.title: Matilda
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Family-friendly comedy with clever humor; adds variety to a lineup dominated by action/franchise titles.

on_server_recommendations.title: Arcane
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Rich world-building and serialized fantasy storytelling; aligns with the user's interest in high‑quality TV drama and fantasy narratives.

on_server_recommendations.title: Westworld
on_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Sci‑fi/psychological thriller with high-concept narratives and prestige TV pedigree; complements the sci‑fi and auteur-focused viewing taste.

off_server_recommendations.title: The Seventh Seal
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Prestige auteur drama with existential/moral themes; fits historical/arthouse sensibility.

off_server_recommendations.title: Paths of Glory
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: WWI war drama with anti-war subtext; aligns with Historical/War-Drama and prestige storytelling.

off_server_recommendations.title: The Exorcist
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Iconic horror/thriller with lasting influence; aligns with Horror/Thriller-Audience.

off_server_recommendations.title: The Manchurian Candidate
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Cold War espionage thriller; strong fit for espionage and mind-control narratives.

off_server_recommendations.title: The Witch
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Period folk horror with restrained dread; complements Horror/Thriller-Audience and prestige sensibility.

off_server_recommendations.title: The Day of the Jackal
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Espionage thriller with procedural precision; classic Cold War spy craft.

off_server_recommendations.title: Three Days of the Condor
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Espionage thriller with paranoia and political intrigue; fits espionage and historical thriller tastes.

off_server_recommendations.title: The Wages of Fear
off_server_recommendations.why_it_matches: Survival/road thriller with high-stakes tension; aligns with survival/post-apocalypse sensibilities.

source_gaps: Cinematographer metadata is almost entirely absent across the history (nearly all items have empty 'cinematographers' arrays) — e.g., If I had Legs I'd Kick You; Hamnet; Mission: Impossible entries; many TV series.
Several TV entries and films lack credited directors/writers in the provided data (e.g., The Pitt, Fallout, Blue Lights, many recent series episodes).
Some items have missing basic metadata fields (null art/thumb or null summaries) — examples: The Rehearsal, Warfare, Beauty and the Beast entries show null or minimal metadata.
Music track entries (individual songs) lack year/credit details in the provided history (Santana, Pink Floyd, Rush tracks have empty credit fields).
Cinematographer metadata was not present in the supplied Plex items.
